canonical_operational_guidance: Use the typed schema payloads in example-payloads.json as the contract source.
Use machine-readable error codes from recoverable_error_shapes instead of stack traces.
Keep the verification workflow under verification/ and treat demo/ as non-canonical.
No live provider calls or real patient data are required to review these artifacts.

environment_inputs.name: ARTIFACT_ROOT_DIR
environment_inputs.purpose: Case-scoped artifact storage for verification bundles.

environment_inputs.name: API_V1_PREFIX
environment_inputs.purpose: Canonical API prefix for runtime docs and internal routes.

environment_inputs.name: DATABASE_URL
environment_inputs.purpose: Database connection required for operational runtime services.

environment_inputs.name: QDRANT_URL
environment_inputs.purpose: Retrieval backend endpoint used by operational runtime checks.

environment_inputs.name: QDRANT_COLLECTION_NAME
environment_inputs.purpose: Collection used by the canonical operational verification path.

environment_inputs.name: DOCTOR_TELEGRAM_ID_ALLOWLIST
environment_inputs.purpose: Doctor access control surface for handoff and protected routes.

environment_inputs.name: PATIENT_BOT_TOKEN
environment_inputs.purpose: Only required for patient bot runtime paths.

environment_inputs.name: DOCTOR_BOT_TOKEN
environment_inputs.purpose: Only required for doctor bot runtime paths.

environment_inputs.name: HF_TOKEN
environment_inputs.purpose: Only required for operational profile provider access.

environment_inputs.name: OCR_PROVIDER_NAME
environment_inputs.purpose: Only required when the operational OCR provider is configured.
